purpose: Re-run the bounded icefall Conformer phone-CTC smoke test on a non-Blackwell RTX 4090 to separate reference-lane correctness from Blackwell compatibility.
success_signal: at least one optimizer step is logged
a recoverable artifact exists under the output directory
stop_conditions: import or startup failure from torch, k2, or data paths
no first optimizer step within the bounded smoke window
repeated OOM after one reduced-load retry
no recoverable output written to the output directory
monitoring_cadence: Poll the remote run every 2 minutes until the first optimizer step or a terminal failure is visible.
next_action_if_pass: Promote the same path to R2 stable small reference validation on the same non-Blackwell class.
next_action_if_fail: Fix the concrete reference-lane blocker before spending more GPU time or touching the canonical Blackwell lane.
